title: Espectacular Assertion IR
description: Language-agnostic representation of an OpenSpec scenario assertion.

id.description: Unique identifier for the assertion. Recommended format: 'capability/requirement/scenario'. Must be compatible with symbol normalization (a-z, 0-9, _, /, -).

archetype.description: Structural frame type: Pure Functional, Stateful API, Boundary Protocol, or CLI/E2E.

targets.description: Language targets this assertion applies to (e.g. ['rust', 'go']). If omitted, applies to all.

when.description: The 'WHEN' clause from the OpenSpec scenario.

then.description: The 'THEN' clause from the OpenSpec scenario.

source.description: Path and line number to the source spec (e.g. 'specs/auth.md:42').

archived.description: The date the spec was archived.

metadata.description: Arbitrary key-value pairs for emitter-specific logic.
